where: Vehicle creation at entry gate based on sensor data
why: Sensor gives a type string. Gate doesn't care about vehicle internals -- just needs a Vehicle to find the right spot and calculate rate.

where: Channel creation based on user preference
why: Multiple services send notifications. Factory centralizes creation. Add Telegram? Change factory only.

where: Processor creation based on payment method selected by user
why: Each processor has different validation and charging logic. Factory picks the right one. Use Factory Method when creation involves private config (API keys, vault credentials).

where: Document creation when user clicks 'New' and selects file type
why: User selects document type at runtime. Factory returns the right document. Adding a new format doesn't change the editor.

where: Ride object creation when user selects ride type
why: Different ride types have different capacity, pricing, and matching rules. Factory creates the right Ride object from user selection.

where: Logger creation based on environment configuration
why: Dev uses ConsoleLogger, production uses CloudLogger. Factory reads config and creates the right logger. Switch environments without code changes.

where: Item dispensing based on selection button/code
why: User presses a button, machine creates the right item. Adding new items means adding a class and registering in the factory.

where: Special cell creation while building the game board
why: Board config specifies cell types. Factory creates the right cell object for each position. Adding PowerUpCell doesn't change board setup logic.

where: Discount creation based on customer tier or promotion code
why: Promotions change weekly. Factory creates the right discount from promo code or customer tier. Cart doesn't know discount internals.

where: Restaurant listing strategy based on user region and preferences
why: Ranking algorithm varies by region and A/B test group. Factory creates the right ranker from config. Adding a new ranking algorithm is one class + one factory line.
